name: Okta: Privileged Users without MFA
description: Users with active role assignments who do not have multi-factor authentication enabled.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment|Okta_MemberOf*1..2]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.authenticationFactors = 0
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
